subcodes.first_line: God hath indeed heard the lamentation of His loved ones who have been wronged yet wronged not, who have been seized yet seized naught from others [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قد سمع الله حنین احبائه الذین ظلموا و ماظلموا و اخذوا و مااخذوا من اکثر
subcodes.subjects: @rejection, opposition and persecution, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @praise and encouragement, @trust and reliance in God; turning to Him at all times, @thankfulness; gratitude
